text.message: oj are you gonna place super weird again to ruin the game?

yes because of how you placed

Traded him then he settled on wheat port

U said sheep port. No grain port.
So you did trade him a port…
I think red wants blue to win
oj u really thought i would win huh
me and red knew all along
